description: Safe example cases for the benchmark evidence harness. These commands are lightweight and do not perform prover work by default.

cases.name: git-head-sha
cases.description: Record the repository commit SHA for the evidence bundle.

cases.name: rustc-version
cases.description: Capture the active Rust compiler version and host triple.

cases.name: cargo-version
cases.description: Capture the Cargo version used for benchmark orchestration.

cases.name: output-artifact-hash-smoke
cases.description: Write a tiny artifact so the harness records declared output hashes.
command: from pathlib import Path; Path('target/benchmark-output-hash-smoke.txt').write_text('benchmark output\n', encoding='utf-8')
